name: io.github.leadbay/leadbay-mcp
title: Leadbay
description: AI lead discovery, qualification, and outreach prep on your Leadbay account.

environmentVariables.name: LEADBAY_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Bearer token, set by the installer. Run `npx -y -p @leadbay/mcp@latest installer` and sign in with your browser.

environmentVariables.name: LEADBAY_REGION
environmentVariables.description: us or fr - Leadbay backend that owns your account.

environmentVariables.name: LEADBAY_MCP_WRITE
environmentVariables.description: Set to 0 to hide composite write tools (default: 1, ON).

environmentVariables.name: LEADBAY_MCP_ADVANCED
environmentVariables.description: Set to 1 to expose granular API tools.
